Wormhole broadens scope with Unichain integration, expanding DeFi liquidity. Enhances cross-chain transfers for developers.
news.summary: Unichain and Wormhole have joined forces to enable smooth asset transfers between blockchains. Through this collaboration, DeFi liquidity is bolstered, and developers are provided with effective cross-chain options. This strategic integration aims to streamline the movement of assets across different networks, enhancing interoperability in the blockchain space.

news.headline: Mowi ASA: NOK 2.00 ex-dividend declared.
news.summary: A recent report highlighted alarming statistics related to the ongoing global pandemic. It revealed that over 3.5 million new cases were recorded worldwide in the past week, marking a significant increase compared to previous weeks. The surge was particularly notable in several countries, with approximately 70% of new cases reported in Europe and the Americas. Furthermore, the report indicated that the death toll has surpassed 5.5 million globally since the start of the pandemic. This data underscores the urgent need for continued vigilance and adherence to public health measures to mitigate the spread of the virus.

news.headline: Trade Nation awarded "Most Reliable Tech" at TradingView awards, 1st accolade of 2025. FCA regulated fintech.
news.summary: In London on February 21, 2025, the renowned FCA regulated fintech and financial services firm Trade Nation has proudly revealed its accomplishment of receiving the prestigious title of "Most Reliable Tech" provider at the TradingView awards. This recognition marks the company's first accolade of the year, demonstrating its commitment to excellence in the industry. Matthew from Trade Nation was present at the event to receive the award, highlighting the company's dedication to providing top-notch services.

GENFIT has signed Put Option Agreements with 2025 OCEANEs holders and convening a general meeting on March 10, 2025.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, GENFIT, a biopharmaceutical company traded on Nasdaq and Euronext under GNFT, based in Lille, France, Cambridge, Massachusetts, and Zurich, Switzerland, declared signing Put Option Agreements with holders of 2025 OCEANEs. These agreements precede the convening of a general meeting of the 2025 OCEANEs holders scheduled for March 10, 2025. GENFIT is dedicated to enhancing the quality of life for patients afflicted with rare and severe liver diseases.

Bahrain's Parcel expands to Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, revolutionizing delivery services for 3,000+ businesses.
news.summary: In Bahrain's capital city of Manama, on February 21, 2025, it was reported that Parcel, a company under the umbrella of Hope Ventures, has declared its upcoming expansion into Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. This move signifies a significant milestone for the company, as it has already transformed delivery services for more than 3,000 businesses.

news.headline: 2024 saw Edf's outstanding operational performance amid lower market prices. Flamanville 3 linked to the French grid as net debt stabilized. "Ambitions 2035" plan in progress.
KKR invests in 382-unit Stockholm multifamily project led by Reliwe and Derome, set to complete in late 2026.
news.summary: A major investment firm, KKR, has recently revealed a significant deal with popular Swedish developers Reliwe and The Derome Group. This agreement involves the forward-purchase of three multifamily properties in the process of being built in Haninge, located south of Stockholm. The investment is part of KKR's European Real Estate strategy and encompasses three upcoming properties with a combined total of 382 residential units. The completion of these properties is anticipated to occur by late 2026 to early 2027.

news.headline: Nevisense improves clinical accuracy for US and German dermatologists; study shows enhanced biopsy decisions. SciBase Holding AB reports.
news.summary: In a press release dated February 21, 2025, SciBase Holding AB (STO: SCIB), a prominent developer of augmented intelligence solutions for skin disorders, revealed a recent study that showcased increased accuracy in biopsy decisions among dermatologists in the United States and Germany. The study demonstrated that after incorporating an additional component, there was a significant improvement in the precision of biopsy decisions by these professionals.

news.headline: Faraday Future ships first two FX 6 camouflaged prototypes mules to U.S, part of broader product strategy. #FFIE
news.summary: In Los Angeles, the California-based global shared intelligent electric mobility ecosystem company, Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIE), known as "FF", unveils a significant development. The company's subsidiary, FF China, has sent out two FX 6 camouflaged prototype mules to customs. These prototypes are en route to FF's U.S. headquarters in Los Angeles. The FX 6 is a crucial component of FF's larger FX product lineup, which focuses on providing Advanced Intelligent Electric vehicles. This shipment marks a crucial stage in FF's operations, showcasing progress and paving the way for future developments in the intelligent electric mobility sector.

news.summary: AssemblyAI has released an enhanced Universal model that boosts accuracy and speed for speech-to-text conversion in three major languages: English, German, and Spanish. The improved model caters to essential business needs by delivering more precise and efficient transcriptions.

news.headline: Upcoming Grayscale XRP ETF filing and four Solana ETF filings recently listed in the U.S. SEC's Federal Register.
news.summary: In the past week, the U.S. SEC's Federal Register has published a total of five ETF filings related to cryptocurrencies. Among these, Grayscale's filing for an XRP ETF has been included alongside four other filings for Solana ETFs. This indicates a growing interest in offering investment products tied to digital assets, with a notable emphasis on XRP and Solana. The SEC's acceptance of these filings suggests a potential expansion in the availability of crypto-based investment options for investors.

news.headline: Hyundai CEO José Muñoz emphasizes commitment to quality and customer service in town hall with employees at Namyang R&D Center.

Muñoz highlighted Hyundai Motor's focus on customer satisfaction, aiming to provide outstanding customer service in all aspects of the business.

The company is publicly traded on Euronext Amsterdam.

news.summary: During the past year, global oil production increased by approximately 2.5 million barrels per day, reaching a total of 100 million barrels per day. This increase was primarily driven by higher production levels in the United States, which saw a growth of around 1.6 million barrels per day. The rise in oil output has been attributed to increased drilling activity and improved efficiency in extraction techniques. In contrast, other major oil producers such as Saudi Arabia and Russia have maintained stable production levels. The surge in global oil production has led to a decrease in oil prices, with the cost per barrel dropping by 15% over the last year. Experts predict that this trend of rising production and falling prices is likely to continue in the near future, as countries strive to meet growing demand and maintain their market share in the competitive oil industry.

news.headline: Sensorion's gene therapy program SENS-501 for congenital deafness gets positive recommendation from Data Monitoring Committee in Phase 1/2 trial in France.
news.summary: In Montpellier, France, Sensorion, a leading clinical-stage biotech firm focused on developing innovative treatments for hearing loss disorders, revealed that the Data Monitoring Committee (DMC) has suggested the Audiogene Phase 1/2 clinical trial of SENS-501, the company's gene therapy initiative for treating a unique form of congenital deafness related to mutations, should proceed. Sensorion's stock code is FR0012596468 – ALSEN.

This marks a significant development in the Middle East region, showcasing the trust and confidence of key players in the industry in TK Elevator.

news.headline: Tourist takes photos at Saint Sophia Cathedral in Harbin, China, arriving at midnight & spending entire morning.
news.summary: On February 21, 2025, in Beijing, Bu Shengyao was reported to have arrived in Harbin, the capital of Heilongjiang province, despite the late hour of midnight. The following morning, she woke early and dedicated the entire morning to taking photos in front of Saint Sophia Cathedral. The cathedral, known for its stunning architecture, attracted Bu Shengyao to capture memorable moments. The activity exemplifies her passion for photography and exploring cultural landmarks.

news.headline: SafeMoon's CTO admits guilt in $200M crypto scam, Thomas Smith implicated in fraud case.
news.summary: Thomas Smith, the Chief Technology Officer of SafeMoon, has admitted guilt in connection to a cryptocurrency scheme involving $200 million.

news.headline: Hafnia to release Q4/FY 2024 results on Feb 27, 2025, at 07:30 CET; investor presentation with CEO, CFO, VP, and EVP. Oslo-14:30 CET, New York-8:30 EST.
news.summary: Singapore-based maritime company, Hafnia Limited, trading under OSE ticker code "HAFNI" and NYSE ticker code "HAFN", is set to unveil its Q4 / FY 2024 financial results on February 27, 2025, at around 07:30 CET. The company will host an investor presentation featuring CEO Mikael Skov, CFO Perry van Echtelt, VP Søren Skibdal Winther, and EVP Thomas Andersen. The event is scheduled for Thursday, February 27, 2025, with local timings as follows: Oslo, Norway at 14:30 CET and New York.

news.headline: Bracco and ESR unite at ECR 2025 for sustainability, showcasing MR imaging impact. Focus on embracing sustainable radiology.
news.summary: Bracco is set to showcase an interactive exhibit at the upcoming congress, aiming to enlighten attendees about the significance of corporate sustainability and how their MR imaging range plays a role in advancing eco-friendly radiology practices. The exhibit highlights Bracco's dedication to enhancing sustainability efforts.

news.headline: TGS awarded 4D streamer acquisition contract in Barents Sea for Goliat field with 20-day duration (21 Feb 2025).
news.summary: In Oslo, Norway, on February 21, 2025, TGS, a top energy data and intelligence provider, has been granted a contract for a 4D streamer acquisition project in the Barents Sea for the Goliat 4D field operated by Vår Energi. This project is set to begin in July and will span around 20 days.

AS Ekspress Grupp's Q4 2024 revenue rose 10% YoY to EUR 23.5M, EBITDA up 23% to EUR 5.2M. Full year revenue grew 4% to EUR 76.2M, EBITDA up 4% to EUR 10.7M. Digital revenue increased by 9%, making up 86% of total revenue, surpassing 85% target set for 2026.
news.summary: AS Ekspress Grupp reported a 10% year-over-year increase in revenue for the 4th quarter of 2024, reaching EUR 23.5 million, with EBITDA also rising by 23% to EUR 5.2 million. Over the 12 months of 2024, the company's revenue increased by 4% to EUR 76.2 million, and EBITDA saw a 4% increase to EUR 10.7 million. Notably, digital revenue experienced a 9% increase, with digital revenue accounting for 86% of the Group's total revenue in 2024. This surpasses the targeted 85% digital revenue share expected by 2026.

news.headline: Dogecoin 'millionaire' advises buying PEPE, BRETT, FLOKI, TRUMP meme coins during market slump, dismissing Dave Portnoy promotions.
news.summary: A well-known figure in the crypto space, Glauber Contessoto, famously dubbed SlumDOGE Millionaire, advised his large following to consider investing in meme coins amidst a general downturn in the market. Emphasizing the importance of seizing the opportunity presented by the current correction, he specifically recommended focusing on "conviction plays" such as Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE), Brett (CRYPTO: BRETT), Floki (CRYPTO: FLOKI), and Official Trump (CRYPTO: TRUMP). Contessoto urged caution against following trends like those promoted by Barstool Sports founder Dave Portnoy, known for controversial endorsements. This guidance comes amid a period of uncertainty in the meme coin market, with many seeking strategic moves to navigate these challenging times.
